summary: Top-K Cross-Match Feature (Goal 3) and Round-Robin Model Selection Testing Complete. All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: goal3 displays correctly with done/total counter (22/45) for cs.RO. Fixed build issue - rebuilt frontend to include 'All goals met' text (was 'Both goals').

fixed_issues.issue: Build contained outdated 'Both goals met' text instead of 'All goals met'
fixed_issues.resolution: Rebuilt frontend with `yarn build` to pick up source code changes

backend: goal3 has required keys: met, label, done, total
cs.RO goal3 is incomplete (met=false, done=22, total=45)
cs.RO goals_met=false because goal3 is not met
All categories goal3 status summary verified
Recent matches have model_used field populated
Model distribution is evenly distributed across 3 models
Timeseries shows model distribution (GPT-5.2, Claude Opus 4.5, Gemini 3 Pro)
Recent matches show model variety (round-robin effect)
Progress endpoint requires authentication (401/403 without token)
frontend: Controls tab shows 3 goals when not all met
Goal 1: Min 10 matches/paper (green checkmark when met)
Goal 2: CI ≤ 10% for top-10 with done/total counter
Est. remaining matches and 'Running' status displayed
cs.DC shows 'All goals met — system idle' (green checkmark)
Round-robin model distribution visible: ~948/947/933 calls for cs.DC

seed_data_creation: None - tested with existing production data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 verified the Top-K Cross-Match feature (Goal 3) and Round-Robin Model Selection. Key findings: (1) cs.RO has incomplete goal3 (22/45 pairs) so goals_met=false, (2) Other 4 categories (cs.DC, econ.GN, physics.comp-ph, q-bio.BM) have goals_met=true, (3) Frontend correctly displays all 3 goals with done/total counters, (4) Round-robin model selection is working - models have ~equal distribution (e.g., cs.DC: 948/947/933 calls). Frontend build was outdated and needed rebuild to show 'All goals met' instead of 'Both goals'.
